name: CIB seven - SOAP Connector
description: Call a SOAP web service from a Service Task via the CIB seven SOAP connector (connectorId: soap-http-connector).

properties.label: Endpoint URL
properties.description: Absolute SOAP endpoint URL, e.g. https://service.example.com/OrderService. Expressions are allowed, e.g. ${endpoint}.

properties.label: SOAP envelope
properties.description: The full SOAP envelope (XML) to send as the request body. A String or an expression, e.g. ${envelope}.

properties.label: Headers (map)
properties.description: Expression resolving to a Map<String,String>. For SOAP 1.1 set Content-Type=text/xml and the SOAPAction header, e.g. ${ {"Content-Type":"text/xml; charset=UTF-8","SOAPAction":"urn:placeOrder"} }. For SOAP 1.2 use Content-Type=application/soap+xml (SOAPAction is carried as an action parameter). SOAPAction has no separate input parameter – it is a header.

properties.label: Request config (map)
properties.description: Optional expression resolving to a Map of request-config options, e.g. ${ {"connection-timeout":5000,"response-timeout":10000} }. Supported keys: authentication-enabled, circular-redirects-allowed, connection-timeout, connection-keep-alive, connection-request-timeout, content-compression-enabled, cookie-spec, expect-continue-enabled, hard-cancellation-enabled, max-redirects, proxy, proxy-preferred-auth-scheme, redirects-enabled, response-timeout, target-preferred-auth-schemes.

properties.label: Status code -> variable
properties.description: Process variable that receives the HTTP status code.

properties.label: Response body -> variable
properties.description: Process variable that receives the SOAP response XML.

properties.label: Response headers -> variable
properties.description: Optional. Process variable that receives the response headers map. Leave empty to skip.
